name: @felix/orchestrator
description: Cloudflare Workers version of the Felix orchestrator (manifest-driven agent runtime with strict A2A/MCP/OpenAI parity)

scripts.dev: pnpm build:manifests && pnpm build:docs && wrangler dev
scripts.dev:remote: pnpm build:manifests && pnpm build:docs && wrangler dev --remote
scripts.deploy: pnpm build:manifests && pnpm build:docs && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm build:manifests && pnpm build:docs && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply orchestrator-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply orchestrator-prod --remote --env production
